Ready for review: paired same-day-after-lag input prep (PreRegisteredAssociationHypothesis + PairedAnalyticalInput/PairedObservation), refusal-aware via WP01 policy delegation, imputed-pair pct + paired source provenance; 56 tests pass; no coefficient computed (deferred to WP03)

review.reference: Review passed: same-day pairing after caller-declared directional integer lag (right series shifted by timedelta(days=lag), keyed to left day) with NO tolerance window and NO lag-scan (tests assert neighboring days don't pair and lag-1 recovers what lag-0 cannot); mandatory pre-registered hypothesis validated (metric pair + signed lag + ExpectedDirection) returned as RefusalOutcome envelope on failure; lag bands |lag|<=3 free / 4..14 needs justification / >14 refused match research Q5; overlap narrowed to actual paired days; raw paired floor 20 (research Q3) refuses, N_eff deferred to WP03; admissibility DELEGATED not reimplemented (evaluate_evidence appears only in single-series builder; paired path propagates series.refusal verbatim, proven by tests constructing refusals via prepare_input_series with inadmissible/empty policies); no coefficient computed; imputation pct + paired source provenance present; byte-stable to_dict, no clock/network. 56/56 tests green; pre-existing descriptive-policy test passes in isolation and is untouched by the diff; commit 843f1c6 touches only owned files.

Ready for review: deterministic Spearman lagged-association correlate tool (midrank ties, N_eff autocorrelation+imputation band via Fisher z, raw<20 / N_eff<12 refusals, confound checklist, forbidden-output guards). Registered + reachable via dispatch + exported. 84/84 mission tests, 541/541 full suite pass.

review.reference: Review passed. Spearman independently verified: [1,2,3,4,5]/[2,1,4,3,5]=0.8, perfect monotone +/-1.0, ties case 0.9545454545 matches scipy spearmanr (proper midrank tie correction), constant series returns None -> refused (no fake zero). N_eff widening verified: rank-based N_eff=N/(1+2*sum rho_xx*rho_yy) over lags 1..min(7,floor(N/4)); on N=40 iid N_eff=37.4 vs autocorrelated walk N_eff=6.0, band width 0.255 vs 0.834 -> rank-switch did NOT skip autocorrelation widening; imputed pairs half-weighted, inflation floored at 1.0, N_eff floored to 4.0 keeping Fisher z valid. Band is Fisher z SE=1/sqrt(N_eff-3) back-transformed clamped [-1,1], never called confidence interval, never thresholded. Refusals exact: raw<20 (insufficient_data), N_eff<12 (insufficient_effective_sample), constant (insufficient_rank_variation), hypothesis mismatch (missing_hypothesis), refused paired input propagated. FORBIDDEN OUTPUT verified by reading code: no p-value/significance computed anywhere; any extra positional/kwarg refused BEFORE computation via _CORRELATE_SUPPORTED_KWARGS=frozenset() gate; banned causal vocab appears only in negated meta-docstrings/refusal-explanations, never in estimate/caveat/confound prose; T016 tests substantive (word-boundary regex over engine prose, full-blob substring check for confidence interval/p-value/significance, recursive key walker, 4 smuggle-request refusal tests). Registry now 3 built-ins, correlate reachable via dispatch with paired_ordered_daily_series shape; facade (list/invoke/load) exported, tool functions intentionally not top-level (matches change_point/smoothed_average convention). analytical.py diff is the single necessary registration line. stdlib math only, no scipy/numpy/clock/network/state. Multiplicity/ledger correctly absent. N_eff envelope judgment: ACCEPT - shared AnalyticalResultEnvelope (other WP, not editable) lacks effective_sample_size top-level; N_eff surfaced in estimate + uncertainty.payload, byte-stable, no info loss. 84/84 mission tests, 541/541 full suite green.
